response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack developer with strong web, cloud, and D-language experience, but the role requires native-level Japanese (not listed), C programming for UNIX as a primary skill (only a brief stint at National Instruments years ago), Linux kernel modification experience, and embedded networking/security domain knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X, switch chips). None of the critical hard requirements are demonstrated in the resume.
strengths: Long track record as a senior/staff engineer across diverse stacks
Some prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops) which aligns with QA collaboration
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language proficiency, which is a hard requirement
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, MACsec, 802.1X, or chip-vendor SDK experience
No Linux kernel source modification or low-level networking (L2/L3, NETCONF, SNMP) background
